post_text: هههههههههههه اهلا بيك في كدبة جاامعة النيل. المصاريف المحطوطه دي بيبقا علي اساس النورمال لود الهوا الطالب في الترم هياخد 18 ساعه فا هيا بتتحسب بالساعه كل سنه حساب الساعه هوا البيغلي. و اعمل حسابك ان كل سنه هتسمع اسباب متخلفه للزياده و هتطبق عليك يعني كان احد احد اسباب الزياده كانت انهم بيعنلو صيانة للاسانسيرات و اقسم بالله ده كان سبب اتقالنا و لو حولت تعترض و تعمل هيتقالك زي متقالنا كده بالنص منهم المش قادر يحول و احنا هنعملو ريكمونديشن ليتر
translated_text:
Hahaha, welcome to the joke of the year at Nile University. The added expenses are based on normal air conditioning usage for students in the semester. Each student will get 18 hours of AC and it's calculated per hour, every year, taking into account the electricity bill. And do your math, you'll hear excuses every year about the increase and they'll apply it to you. One of the reasons for the increase was supposedly maintenance for the elevators, I swear that was the reason we were told, and if you complain, they'll tell you what we're saying now, word for word. They can't even change it themselves, so we have to do a re-recommendation.

[Comments: Hahaha, welcome to the joke of the year at Nile University. The added expenses are based on normal air conditioning usage for students in the semester. Each student will get 18 hours of AC and it's calculated per hour, every year, taking into account the electricity bill. And do your math, you'll hear excuses every year about the increase and they'll apply it to you. One of the reasons for the increase was supposedly maintenance for the elevators, I swear that was the reason we were told, and if you complain, they'll tell you what we're saying now, word for word. They can't even change it themselves, so we have to do a re-recommendation.]
signal: University's administrative excuses and lack of transparency in fee increases are causing frustration among students.
